# Senshin Marga

> Japan business enablement consultancy based in Bengaluru, India. We provide Japanese translation, interpretation, bilingual staffing, corporate training, JLPT preparation, and cross-cultural consulting for Japan-facing businesses across India.

Senshin Marga ("Where Language Meets Culture") helps professionals and organizations build meaningful connections through Japanese language support, cultural understanding, and business communication.

## Services

- Japanese Translation — accurate document and content translation between Japanese and English.
- Interpretation — on-site and remote interpreting for meetings, travel, and negotiations.
- Staffing & Recruiting — bilingual (Japanese-English) talent placement.
- Corporate Training — business Japanese and cross-cultural training for teams.
- Cross-Cultural Consulting — guidance on Japanese business etiquette and communication.
- JLPT Preparation — coaching for Japanese-Language Proficiency Test candidates.

## Industries Served

Engineering & Manufacturing, Automotive, Information Technology, Industrial Equipment, Logistics & Supply Chain, Trading & Export-Import.

## Contact

- Website: https://senshinmarga.in/
- Email: operations@miraisetu.in
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 90374 61451
- Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India (serving businesses across India)

## Notes

- Languages: Japanese (ja), English (en)
- Response time: typically within 2 hours on WhatsApp
